title: ProfileMeta
description: Metadata file for a UEVR game profile.

ID.description: Unique identifier for the profile (UUID v4 or all-zero sentinel).

exeName.description: The game executable name (without .exe), used as the profile folder name.

gameVersion.description: Optional game version(s) this profile was made for.

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the profile was last modified.

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the profile was first created.

downloadDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the profile was downloaded by the sync script.

sourceName.description: Name of the source the profile was obtained from.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the profile source or download endpoint.

zipHash.description: MD5 hash (uppercase hex) of the downloaded profile ZIP file.

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the profile folder using a third-party service (e.g. GitFolderDownloader).

sourceDownloadUrl.description: The original URL where the profile ZIP was downloaded from.

remarks.description: Free-form notes about the profile, e.g. version info or special instructions.

donateURL.description: Optional URL for donating to the profile author.

appID.description: Optional application ID for the game (e.g. Steam AppID).

headerPictureUrl.description: Optional URL to a header or banner image for the game.

minUEVRNightlyNumber.description: Minimum UEVR nightly build number required for this profile.

maxUEVRNightlyNumber.description: Maximum UEVR nightly build number supported by this profile (null = no upper limit).

nullifyPlugins.description: Whether UEVR should nullify plugins when using this profile.

lateInjection.description: Whether UEVR should use late injection mode for this game.

description.description: Non-formatted, plain text description of the profile.

profileName.description: Short identifying name of the profile variant.

fileCopies.description: Optional list of files to copy from the profile folder into the game directory.

sourceFileRelProfile.description: Path to the source file, relative to the profile folder.

destinationFolderRelGameEXE.description: Destination folder path, relative to the game EXE directory.

tags.description: Optional list of tags describing the profile's state or features.
